overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic elevated glass walkway in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves along an enclosed skybridge overlooking busy neon-lit streets below, passing an NPC observer before transitioning through urban intersections and ending in a rooftop garden area. The scene features high-quality ray-traced lighting with dominant cyan and pink neon reflections on wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated glass walkway overlooking multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an enclosed glass walkway elevated above the city street, observing the traffic and neon-lit buildings below

entered.detail: transparent glass corridor with metal framing enclosing the elevated pathway
monorail or transit tracks running parallel to the walkway
multi-lane road below with moving cars and wet reflective asphalt
futuristic buildings illuminated with cyan and pink neon signage
transparent safety barrier along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view inside a glass-enclosed elevated walkway above a busy Night City street. The player moves forward along the transparent corridor, looking down at moderate traffic flowing on the wet asphalt below, surrounded by towering buildings with bright neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with prominent Night City signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway, approaching and passing an NPC standing by the railing

notable_agents.action: standing by the glass railing looking out at the street traffic below

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan text reading 'NIGHT CITY' on the glass walkway
massive screen displaying advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues with prominent 'NIGHT CITY' signage visible on the glass walls. The player passes an NPC standing at the railing observing the traffic, while large digital billboards illuminate the left side of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway crossing over large urban intersection

events.description: walkway opens up to reveal a wide intersection with multiple crosswalks and traffic signals below

agents.ego_description: moving over a wide urban intersection, looking down at the crosswalks and traffic flowing in multiple directions

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings visible on the street below
illuminated traffic lights controlling the flow of vehicles

segments.scene_description: The enclosed walkway opens up to cross a major urban intersection, revealing a wider view of the city canyon. The player moves over multiple lanes of traffic and crosswalks, with the street appearing closer and more detailed below.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved walkway section with neon commercial signage

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved section of the walkway, passing by various neon signs and building facades

entered.detail: bright neon signs for bars and shops with pink and yellow illumination
building front with angular neon light strips forming geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The walkway curves through a dense commercial district, with vibrant neon signage for various businesses lining the right side. The player moves past geometric neon facades while traffic continues to flow on the streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop garden walkway with glass floor overlooking lower levels

events.description: transition from dense urban street view to enclosed rooftop garden with trees and vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking into a darker rooftop garden area, moving across glass flooring with views down to lower levels

entered.detail: dense green bushes and plants lining the walkway
transparent floor panels revealing the levels below
large trees with uplighting creating dramatic shadows

segments.scene_description: The walkway transitions into a rooftop garden environment, replacing the urban street views with dense vegetation and illuminated trees. The player walks across transparent glass flooring looking down to lower garden levels, with the lighting becoming darker and more natural compared to the neon-lit streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a glass-enclosed skybridge that gradually expands to reveal a sweeping vista of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins inside the transparent corridor, gliding forward while looking down at moderate traffic flowing across wet asphalt beneath towering buildings. As the camera advances, it passes an observer leaning against the railing and moves beneath large digital billboards and prominent Night City signage etched into the glass. The scene then opens up as the walkway crosses a major urban intersection, shifting from a confined passage to a wide-angle perspective. Finally, the view expands over multiple lanes of traffic and detailed crosswalks, fully exposing the scale of the city's glowing architecture below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant commercial district that gradually transitions into a secluded rooftop garden. It begins by curving through a dense urban corridor, gliding past geometric neon facades and glowing business signage while traffic flows on the streets below. As the walkway advances, the surrounding cityscape shifts from artificial brilliance to organic textures, replacing the neon-lit vistas with dense vegetation and illuminated trees. The scene then opens onto transparent glass flooring that reveals lower garden levels, while the lighting softens from vivid cyan and pink tones into a darker, more natural atmosphere.
